heroBody: A small Pune-based practice. Certified, supervised psychologists who help you figure out what's loud, what's stuck, and what's quietly waiting to be said.
approachBody: We don't fix — we sit with you while you sort through what's loud, what's stuck, and what's quietly waiting to be said.
pullQuote: Six months in, I have words for things I couldn't describe before. That's changed more than I expected.
